title: Enckea laevigata

This classification suggests that Enckea laevigata belongs to the order Alismatales. The plant's classification is further supported by its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf structure and inflorescence. Enckea laevigata is native to tropical regions, and its classification as an Arum family member is consistent with its growth habits and adaptations. The classification of Enckea laevigata as a member of the Aroideae subfamily highlights its evolutionary relationships with other plants in this group.
